summary: Bangladesh is navigating significant economic and political developments as the government pushes for research-driven university development and weighs trade policy with the US, while 39 banks have launched a major Tk 425 crore venture capital platform to support startups. The financial sector is also expanding access to credit through new e-loan products up to Tk 50,000, though businesses continue to face bureaucratic bottlenecks hindering growth. On infrastructure, the government is planning the Padma Barrage project worth Tk 334.74 billion while signaling progress toward building a second Padma Bridge. In cricket, Bangladesh has put Pakistan under pressure in their ongoing test match, and the country's vaccination drives are actively tracking children who missed measles immunizations.
